on a boolean SparseMatrixCSC is extremely slow on 1.11.1","user":{"login":"JaredSchwartz","id":75581425,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjc1NTgxNDI1","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/75581425?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz","html_url":"https://github.com/JaredSchwartz","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/JaredSchwartz/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-10-26T03:44:51Z","updated_at":"2024-10-26T03:44:51Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"Using`sortslices` on a boolean sparse matrix is more than 100x slower than `sortslices` on sparse matrices of other data types or directly summing and sorting the slices running Julia 1.11.1. 

Replicated the issue on both Windows and MacOS builds and do not see the same issue on 1.10.5

```julia
using SparseArrays

function sum_sort(matrix::SparseMatrixCSC)
    csum = vec(sum(matrix, dims=1))
    perm = sortperm(csum)
    return matrix[:,perm]
end

test_mat_bool = rand(Bool,1000,1000) |> SparseMatrixCSC

result_bool = @time sortslices(test_mat_bool, dims=2, by=sum)
result_bool2 = @time sum_sort(test_mat_bool)
@assert result_bool == (result_bool2 |> dropzeros!)

test_mat_int = rand(Int,1000,1000) |> SparseMatrixCSC

result_int = @time sortslices(test_mat_int, dims=2, by=sum)
result_int2 = @time sum_sort(test_mat_int)
@assert result_int == (result_int2 |> dropzeros!)
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56343/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56343/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null}}
